title: Connector unit, wire harness, and connector fitting structure
abstract: A connector unit comprises: a connector that has terminals connected to terminal parts of electric wires, and a housing that holds the terminals; and a cylindrical connector cover that is formed from an elastic material and that covers the housing. The connector cover has an annular seal part provided at a position at which it is possible to contact a mating connector-side surface in a fitted state with the mating connector.
claims: 1. A connector unit, comprising: a connector including a terminal fitting that is connected to a terminating end portion of an electric wire and a housing that holds the terminal fitting; and a tubular connector cover that covers the housing and is formed from an elastic material, wherein the connector cover includes a looped seal portion, the looped seal portion is arranged at a position allowing for contact with a surface of a mating connector in a state fitted to the mating connector, the connector includes a connector position assurance component assuring proper fitting to the mating connector; and the connector cover includes a window that exposes the connector position assurance component to the outside of the connector cover and a lid that freely opens and closes the window.
